account_niche.description: Immersive, futuristic visuals paired with electronic music
account_niche.why_underserved: Lack of high-quality, AI-generated neon-themed content
account_niche.visual_style: Vibrant, neon-lit cityscapes and abstract patterns

selection_reason: Neon Dreamscape has the highest growth potential due to its low competition level and the lack of high-quality, AI-generated neon-themed content. Additionally, the vibrant and futuristic visual style of this niche is well-suited for AI video generation, making it an ideal choice for an AI-run Instagram account.
